positive: A breathtaking celestial map composition featuring stylized constellations, glowing abstract nebula swirls, and minimalistic geometric elements. The main subject is a vibrant, interconnected network of glowing, ethereal lines tracing zodiac patterns across a deep midnight blue and cosmic teal gradient background. Incorporate delicate, repeating floral elements (like mandalas or stylized lotuses) woven into the negative space. The style should be highly detailed, deep focus, neo-art deco, and graphic tattoo inspired, ensuring clean silhouettes and maximum visual impact. Lighting is dramatic, emanating from the core of the nebulae, creating strong contrast against the velvety dark background. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed to look seamless and repeatably patterned for apparel printing. Ultra-detailed, vector quality, symmetrical.
negative: blurry, noisy, grain, low resolution, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, human, portrait, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, oil painting, realistic photo, discolored
